parts.text: Create a hero illustration for the webpage 'Recent Publications | Sasha Apartsin' (research/recent-publications.html). Concept: research methods, publications, and experimentation. Composition: widescreen banner aspect, calm but modern, suitable as page header visual. Style: professional editorial illustration, clean composition, subtle depth, warm-neutral palette (#f6f3ec, #9c5a2e, #2f6f9c), high clarity, no logos, no watermark, no readable text.
